skills.name: execution-context
skills.description: Add ExecutionContext struct to VM — MessageID, CorrelationID, TraceID, Partition, Offset, Headers, Deadline, Tenant, RetryCount, local vars

skills.name: message-envelope
skills.description: Replace raw JSON body with structured Envelope containing Headers, Body, Metadata, Topic, Partition, Offset, Timestamp, Key

skills.name: vm-scheduler
skills.description: Add Executor → Scheduler → WorkerQueue → ThreadPool → VM layer for async/parallel dispatch

skills.name: work-stealing
skills.description: Work-stealing deques for parallel execution via crossbeam-deque

skills.name: vm-continuations
skills.description: Suspend/resume VM when service calls block; continuations for async opcode

skills.name: bytecode-version
skills.description: Header with Magic, Version, Checksum on serialized plans; reject incompatible versions

skills.name: rule-cache
skills.description: LRU cache in Go engine for compiled plans; avoid recompilation on hot path

skills.name: snapshotting
skills.description: Save/load compiled plans as binary snapshots; mmap for cold-start

skills.name: plugin-system
skills.description: Plugin interface for service calls: Builtin, WASM, Remote (HTTP/gRPC)

skills.name: kafka-transport
skills.description: Full Kafka semantics: consumer groups, offset commit, batch poll, backpressure, poison messages, DLQ, rebalance

skills.name: dsl-extensions
skills.description: Add loop, window, aggregate, filter, merge, join, cache, state, timer, delay, await, race, try/catch DSL tokens

skills.name: vm-optimizations
skills.description: Optimizer passes: constant folding, DCE, CSE, jump optimization, tail merging, instruction fusion

skills.name: ffi-extensions
skills.description: ABI version handshake, panic isolation, timeout/cancellation, streaming API, batch execute

skills.name: memory-pools
skills.description: Typed object pools: Expression Pool, Context Pool, Plan Pool, JSON Arena, thread-local arenas
